item.description:
### ✨ 本次更新
**🎨 优化** - 优化导航栏与「关于」页面 UI 展示，界面更清晰统一 - 优化国际化显示，提升多语言体验 - 调整 Hide Sidebar 位置，操作更顺手
**🛠 修复** - 修复从暗黑模式切换为“跟随系统”未实时生效的问题
**🚀 新特性** - 重构「排除应用」页面展示 - 支持批量添加与删除应用，提高管理效率
---
### ✨ What's New
**🎨 Improvements** - Refined navigation bar and About page UI for a cleaner, more consistent look - Improved internationalization display for better multilingual experience - Adjusted Hide Sidebar position for more intuitive access
**🛠 Fixes** - Fixed an issue where switching from Dark Mode to “Follow System” didn’t apply in real time
**🚀 Features** - Redesigned Excluded Apps page layout - Added support for batch add/remove to streamline management

### ✨ 本次更新
- 🎨 优化设置页发布版外观，修复 Xcode 运行与 DMG 安装版之间的界面风格差异，让颜色、导航栏和 footer 表现更加统一。 - 🛠️ 调整 Release DMG 构建流程，固定发布环境并增加 Xcode / SDK 校验，减少因 CI 环境变化带来的界面偏差。 - 🍺 修复 Homebrew Tap 更新流程，改为更稳定的 GitHub API 发布方式，避免更新步骤卡住导致 Homebrew 安装版本落后的问题。 - ✅ 提升整体发布稳定性，让 GitHub Release、DMG 和 Homebrew cask 的版本同步更加可靠。
--- ### ✨ This Release
- 🎨 Improved the appearance of the packaged Settings window by fixing visual differences between Xcode builds and the distributed DMG, making colors, sidebar styling, and footer layout more consistent. - 🛠️ Updated the Release DMG pipeline by pinning the build environment and validating the Xcode / SDK version to reduce UI drift caused by CI changes. - 🍺 Fixed the Homebrew Tap publishing flow by switching to a more reliable GitHub API-based update path, preventing stalled updates that left Homebrew users on outdated versions. - ✅ Improved overall release stability so GitHub Releases, DMG artifacts, and the Homebrew cask stay in sync more reliably.

#### 🎉 更新公告
- 🔧 修复footer提示文字排版 --- #### 🎉 Release Note - 🔧 fix footer tips text style issues
